title: Resource Estimation Tools
description: Learn to estimate quantum computational resources including qubit counts, gate requirements, execution time, and costs for both NISQ and fault-tolerant implementations using industry-standard tools.
learningObjectives: Use Azure Quantum Resource Estimator for fault-tolerant cost analysis
Calculate logical qubit and T-gate requirements for algorithms
Estimate physical qubit overhead for different error correction codes
Analyze time-to-solution for various quantum hardware architectures
Compare resource requirements across different implementation strategies
